recentTweets.text:
The fact is, Trump has spent the past two years making our lives worse - spending billions of dollars on ICE and foreign wars and tax cuts for the super wealthy - while the American people struggle with skyrocketing costs and a broken healthcare system.

Now it’s catching up to
Don’t lose hope and don’t lose focus. The power is in your hands. It’s your democracy, not his.
Trump’s speech last night, and his obsession with losing the 2020 election, offers three really important insights 🧵👇🏻

Pretty fucked up actually
https://t.co/W4ecmcE40X
Public servants get their salary, and that’s it.
From a speech to a Supreme Court case, the federal officials involved shouldn’t be able to bet on the outcome.

The Supreme Court doesn’t need to wait for Congress to take action - they can make the change now.

We sent a letter directly to Chief Justice John Roberts demanding he enforce the ban for all Justices and their staff. https://t.co/yXFB9xDm2M

Kalshi and Polymarket have their own rules, but our bill, the No Profiting from Public Service Act, makes it federal law that politicians and Supreme Court Justices are banned from betting on prediction markets. https://t.co/bGDzE4lR04

From the President to the teleprompter operator — it should be illegal for anyone in the federal government to make money off of their position.

How we’re leading this anti-corruption effort in Congress.👇🏼

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Greg Landsman. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language.
